## Meeting Purpose

[Handover sales tasks and processes from Alice to Owen, with guidance from Bruno and Kyle.](https://fathom.video/share/cHczwx_mczksvws4Gks1_sRR_sBHhQh6?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Owen is taking over Alice's sales support responsibilities, including managing Atio CRM, creating SOWs in PandaDoc, and setting up client workspaces in Notion](https://fathom.video/share/cHczwx_mczksvws4Gks1_sRR_sBHhQh6?tab=summary&timestamp=113.0)
  - [The sales process involves qualifying leads, sending proposals, and following up through a structured workflow](https://fathom.video/share/cHczwx_mczksvws4Gks1_sRR_sBHhQh6?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [GrowthX is implementing new qualification processes and adjusting their sales approach, particularly regarding pilots and contract terms](https://fathom.video/share/cHczwx_mczksvws4Gks1_sRR_sBHhQh6?tab=summary&timestamp=731.0)
  - [Team is preparing for potential increased inbound leads due to upcoming Series A announcement and new Chief Content Officer](https://fathom.video/share/cHczwx_mczksvws4Gks1_sRR_sBHhQh6?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)

## Topics

### Sales Process Overview

  - [Inbound leads typically come through the website, often via referrals or LinkedIn posts](https://fathom.video/share/cHczwx_mczksvws4Gks1_sRR_sBHhQh6?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)
  - [New qualification process implemented: leads answer questions before booking, get enriched, then routed to sales or DQ sequence](https://fathom.video/share/cHczwx_mczksvws4Gks1_sRR_sBHhQh6?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)
  - [Color-coding system for lead qualification: red (no-go), yellow (potential), green (high-quality)](https://fathom.video/share/cHczwx_mczksvws4Gks1_sRR_sBHhQh6?tab=summary&timestamp=1785.0)
  - [Aim to add 4 new proposals, eliminate 2, and close 1-2 deals daily](https://fathom.video/share/cHczwx_mczksvws4Gks1_sRR_sBHhQh6?tab=summary&timestamp=1632.0)

### CRM (Atio) Management

  - [Create new deals in Atio with company details, contact info, and deal specifics](https://fathom.video/share/cHczwx_mczksvws4Gks1_sRR_sBHhQh6?tab=summary&timestamp=1207.0)
  - [Use "handover notes" template for important deal information and context](https://fathom.video/share/cHczwx_mczksvws4Gks1_sRR_sBHhQh6?tab=summary&timestamp=1844.0)
  - [Update deal stages, values, and dates as the sales process progresses](https://fathom.video/share/cHczwx_mczksvws4Gks1_sRR_sBHhQh6?tab=summary&timestamp=1775.0)
  - [Attach relevant documents (e.g., signed contracts) to deal records](https://fathom.video/share/cHczwx_mczksvws4Gks1_sRR_sBHhQh6?tab=summary&timestamp=1180.0)

### Proposal Creation (PandaDoc)

  - [Use specific template (current V3) for creating Statement of Work (SOW)](https://fathom.video/share/cHczwx_mczksvws4Gks1_sRR_sBHhQh6?tab=summary&timestamp=1659.0)
  - [Customize SOW with client details, work stream specifics, and contract terms](https://fathom.video/share/cHczwx_mczksvws4Gks1_sRR_sBHhQh6?tab=summary&timestamp=1820.0)
  - [Adjust pilot period from standard 90 days to 30 days when applicable](https://fathom.video/share/cHczwx_mczksvws4Gks1_sRR_sBHhQh6?tab=summary&timestamp=1479.0)
  - [Send SOW via PandaDoc for client review and signature](https://fathom.video/share/cHczwx_mczksvws4Gks1_sRR_sBHhQh6?tab=summary&timestamp=1487.0)

### Client Onboarding

  - [Create Slack channels for new clients (prefix: EX-\[ClientName\])](https://fathom.video/share/cHczwx_mczksvws4Gks1_sRR_sBHhQh6?tab=summary&timestamp=5709.0)
  - [Set up client workspace in Notion using template, customizing with client info](https://fathom.video/share/cHczwx_mczksvws4Gks1_sRR_sBHhQh6?tab=summary&timestamp=6194.0)
  - [Share Notion workspace with client stakeholders (as guests, not workspace members)](https://fathom.video/share/cHczwx_mczksvws4Gks1_sRR_sBHhQh6?tab=summary&timestamp=6560.0)
  - [Schedule and prepare for kickoff meeting, sharing agenda and asking clients to fill out their sections](https://fathom.video/share/cHczwx_mczksvws4Gks1_sRR_sBHhQh6?tab=summary&timestamp=6717.0)

### Follow-up Process

  - [Send follow-up email after initial call with SOW, Slack channel invite, and call recording](https://fathom.video/share/cHczwx_mczksvws4Gks1_sRR_sBHhQh6?tab=summary&timestamp=5619.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up calls to discuss SOW and address any questions](https://fathom.video/share/cHczwx_mczksvws4Gks1_sRR_sBHhQh6?tab=summary&timestamp=6760.0)
  - [Continue following up if clients go silent, adjusting kickoff dates as needed](https://fathom.video/share/cHczwx_mczksvws4Gks1_sRR_sBHhQh6?tab=summary&timestamp=6032.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Owen to familiarize himself with Atio CRM and PandaDoc](https://fathom.video/share/cHczwx_mczksvws4Gks1_sRR_sBHhQh6?tab=summary&timestamp=1499.0)
  - [Alice to share email templates and SOPs with Owen](https://fathom.video/share/cHczwx_mczksvws4Gks1_sRR_sBHhQh6?tab=summary&timestamp=5830.0)
  - [Owen to be added to weekly sales-related call with Bruno](https://fathom.video/share/cHczwx_mczksvws4Gks1_sRR_sBHhQh6?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - Team to consider creating a <sales@growthx.ai> email alias for streamlined communication
  - [Revisit and potentially refine new qualification and sales processes as team gets more experience with them](https://fathom.video/share/cHczwx_mczksvws4Gks1_sRR_sBHhQh6?tab=summary&timestamp=1737.0)
